prompt: Professional infographic titled "Q4 Sales Funnel". Style: minimal corporate. Layout: top section contains a bold headline "Q4 Sales Funnel" with a thin horizontal rule beneath it; below that, four vertically stacked funnel stages displayed as progressively narrowing trapezoid bars from top to bottom — Stage 1: Leads (widest bar), Stage 2: Qualified, Stage 3: Proposals Sent, Stage 4: Deals Closed (narrowest bar); each bar is labeled on the left with the stage name and on the right with the corresponding number in large bold type; a conversion rate percentage label appears between each adjacent stage showing the drop-off; footer contains a thin rule and a small source line in light gray. Color palette: corporate navy #003087, medium blue #0057B8, light blue #5B9BD5, white #FFFFFF. Typography: bold sans-serif headlines at 60pt minimum for the infographic title, stage numbers rendered at 48pt bold in white inside or beside each bar, stage name labels at 24pt semi-bold in navy #003087, conversion percentages at 18pt in medium blue #0057B8, footer text at 12pt in light gray #AAAAAA; all text must be perfectly legible at full resolution. Data content: Funnel Stage 1 — Leads: 1,000; Funnel Stage 2 — Qualified: 250 (25% of Leads); Funnel Stage 3 — Proposals Sent: 50 (20% of Qualified); Funnel Stage 4 — Deals Closed: 15 (30% of Proposals). Visual elements: four solid trapezoidal funnel bars decreasing in width from Stage 1 to Stage 4, colored navy #003087 for Stage 1, medium blue #0057B8 for Stage 2, light blue #5B9BD5 for Stage 3, and a highlighted accent bar in navy #003087 with a white checkmark icon for Stage 4 to emphasize the close; small downward chevron icons between each stage to indicate flow; clean horizontal white divider lines between sections; no decorative illustrations. Quality directive: ultra-sharp, print-quality detail, pixel-perfect element alignment, zero text rendering errors, fully suitable for embedding in a 16:9 PowerPoint slide at high resolution. Do not add decorative elements not specified. Render all text as clean, unblurred, perfectly legible typography. Negative: blurry text, garbled typography, illegible fonts, inconsistent color palette, random decorative clutter, misaligned elements, overlapping labels, incorrect data values, stock photo aesthetic, photorealistic faces, lens flare, bokeh, photography lighting, beauty filters, skin textures.
